---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for OptiDesign
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: FAkohoue
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the limitation or gap you are encountering.
     Focus on the problem, not the solution — what are you currently
     unable to do, or what is unnecessarily difficult? -->

## Which part of the package does this relate to?

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `prep_famoptg()` — repeated-check block design construction
- [ ] `evaluate_famoptg_efficiency()` — block design evaluation
- [ ] `optimize_famoptg()` — block design optimisation
- [ ] `alpha_rc_stream()` — alpha row-column stream construction
- [ ] `evaluate_alpha_efficiency()` — alpha design evaluation
- [ ] `optimize_alpha_rc()` — alpha design optimisation
- [ ] New design family or constructor
- [ ] New optimality criterion (A, D, CDmean, other)
- [ ] New optimisation method (RS, SA, GA, other)
- [ ] Residual structure (IID, AR1, AR1×AR1, other)
- [ ] Relationship matrix handling (GRM, A, K)
- [ ] Documentation or vignette
- [ ] Other / unsure

## Describe the solution you want

<!-- Describe what you would like the package to do.
     If relevant, sketch the function signature or argument you have in mind.
     For example:

     optimize_famoptg(..., method = "SA", sa_max_iter = 500)

     or

     evaluate_alpha_efficiency(..., criterion = "I")
-->

## Have you considered any alternatives?

<!-- Are there workarounds you have tried, or alternative approaches
     that partially address the problem? What are their limitations? -->

## Statistical or methodological context

<!-- If this request involves a specific statistical method, optimality
     criterion, or design principle, please provide a brief description
     or a reference. For example:

     - Rincent et al. (2012) for CDmean
     - Williams (1977) for alpha-lattice theory
     - A paper describing the design type or criterion you need

     This helps evaluate feasibility and implementation correctness. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Any other information that might help: trial size, number of entries,
     field constraints, genomic data availability, or downstream analysis
     workflow. Screenshots or figures are welcome. -->
